title: Porporite

The '''Porporites''' were a [[Cetacean/Legends|cetacean]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Porpor system/Legends|Porpor system]]. After making first contact with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] shortly after the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]], they became addicted to [[Ryll/Legends|ryll]] [[Spice/Legends|spice]], which had recently been discovered. It whipped them into a homicidal frenzy, prompting them to attack other [[Planet/Legends|worlds]]. They withstood everything the Republic used to stop them until they were finally exterminated by the [[Gank/Legends|Ganks]] in [[4800 BBY]] at the beginning of what became known as the [[Gank Massacres]].

==Biology and appearance==
The Porporites were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Cetacean/Legends|cetaceans]]. They had an extremely rapid reproduction cycle.<ref name="Droids" />

==History==
[[File:JuggernautWarDroid-NEGTD.png|thumb|right|upright|The Porporites resisted assaults by Republic Juggernaut war droids (pictured here).]]
The Porporites were native to the [[Porpor system/Legends|Porpor system]], located in the [[Grohl sector/Legends|Grohl sector]] and the general vicinity of the [[Naps Fral Cluster/Legends|Naps Fral Cluster]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="Atlas" /> They were first introduced to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] shortly after the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]], which ended in 4,990 BBY.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|38|}}</ref> Some [[Time/Legends|time]] after this, [[Ryll/Legends|ryll]] [[Spice/Legends|spice]] was discovered on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]]. The [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] species gained exclusive distribution rights and introduced the spice to the Porporites. The drug induced homicidal rage in Porporite users, and widespread addiction to the substance swept through the Porporite population.<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> The formerly peaceful species was transformed into violent maniacs and started assaulting other [[Planet/Legends|planets]].<ref name="Codex">{{TORcite|type=codex|Galactic History 34: The Discovery of Ryll}}</ref> Faced with waves of maddened Porporites,<ref name="Droids" /> the Republic asked the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] for assistance. The Jedi intervened,<ref name="Codex" /> fighting alongside newly commissioned [[Juggernaut war droid]]s, but had little success in placating the Porporites.<ref name="Droids" />

Concerned neighboring species of the Porpor system<ref name="CSWE" /> and various other factions responded to this threat by hiring [[Gank/Legends|Gank]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]], also known as Gank Killers, to protect them<ref name="NEC" /> and to eliminate the Porporites.<ref name="CSWE" /> In [[4800 BBY]], the Ganks [[Speciecide|exterminated]] the entire Porporite species—only to continue their rampage in a full-scale war against the Republic. That war, later known as the [[Gank Massacres]], was eventually put down by the Jedi Order.<ref name="NEC" />

[[The New Essential Chronology (in-universe)|''The New Essential Chronology'']], a book published by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] Historical Council under the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]], was published in [[36 ABY]] and mentioned information on the Porporites. The work expounded on the species' role around the time of the Gank Massacres, including the ryll spice incident.<ref name="NEC" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Porporites were first mentioned in ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', authored by [[Daniel Wallace]] and [[Kevin J. Anderson]] and published in [[2005]].<ref name="NEC" /> The Porporites were also mentioned in the Codex of ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'', a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game (MMORPG) by [[BioWare]]. The Codex entry on the Porporites was accessible when the player character gained a datacron on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]].<ref name="TOR">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''</ref>
